basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Lab Technician Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, New Delhi (AIIMS New Delhi) has released the official Lab Technician Notification 2026 on its official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the AIIMS New Delhi Lab Technician Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates with a maximum age of 30 years and a B.Sc. in Medical Laboratory Technology (MLT) can apply offline on or before 23-07-2026. The official notification PDF and application form are available below.

salary_details.details: Rs. 21,000/- per month (Consolidated as per existing NACO rule)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Lab Technician Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 23-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download AIIMS Lab Technician Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Lab Technician Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the AIIMS Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. content_sections.heading: AIIMS Lab Technician Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Lab Technician recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the AIIMS Lab Technician position is 23rd July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Lab Technician post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.Sc. in Medical Laboratory Technology (MLT) to be eligible for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Lab Technician position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Lab Technician post is 30 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Lab Technician role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 21,000 per month as per existing NACO rules.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Lab Technician post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Lab Technician position at AIIMS, New Delhi.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their application form to the specified address.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the AIIMS Lab Technician recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of applications followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. Where is AIIMS, New Delhi located?
faq.answer: AIIMS, New Delhi is located at New Delhi, Delhi, with the pincode 110029.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for this Lab Technician position is contractual.
